emails.subject: RE: MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE - OFFICER ELECTIONS
emails.body: RE: MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE OFFICER ELECTIONS I recommend David Port for position of Vice President. Rick Buy

emails.subject: RE: MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE - OFFICER ELECTIONS
emails.body: Rick, we received your recommendation. Please let us know if Mr. Lay, Mr. Whalley and your Human Resource Representative concurs and then we will type up the resolution to appoint Mr. Port as a Vice President of Enron Corp.

emails.subject: RE: MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE - OFFICER ELECTIONS
emails.body: Rick, I will also need to know David Port's exact name and the exact name of the position you are recommending. Thanks.
